textByHash.c690b899beeffa618fad6b02a19e36316b5c6e72: Welcome to Blackhole, human. Can I help you?
textByHash.e3b15e952ba657ff739930eae0d2df0038903073: Why, I'm Thordur. Thordur the dwarf. A long time ago, I used to run a business letting people visit my Blackhole for fun.
textByHash.882baba0e550ca79f84e448dd392db0cb4ff94a5: The business was good, but eventually the time came for me to retire. So now I live here in Blackhole where it's more peaceful.
textByHash.dc0283ecba13bfb228e08c87ba2b4ce3c93def84: Blackhole? Well, it's sort of like a hole, and it's generally not very well lit. I'll let you work out the rest.
textByHash.487f36b492720bc82b62cd1ef5ac4596187dcf8a: If you're asking why it's here at all, it was a sort of prison. Bad people were locked here. But it's my home now.
textByHash.f5dca5faec1e43602b23c6a8e88168ff206c8298: Just activate your Disk of Returning. It'll pop you back out to the mines.
textByHash.50c59feb8b24a67bea21a0fe52017c5a311dc028: Why, surely you've got your Disk of Returning? I can't believe you could have lost it in here.
textByHash.4e59ed4d8e9fe20c2f0924cdbf22a952a8417a4e: I really don't understand humans sometimes. Hold tight and I'll sort you out...
